# pico-resilience

> Resilience AOP for the Pico ecosystem: @retryable, @circuit_breaker and @timeout method interceptors.

## Docs

- [Home](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-resilience/)
- [Getting Started](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-resilience/getting-started/)
- [Learning Roadmap](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-resilience/LEARN/)
- [Architecture](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-resilience/architecture/)
- [Hot Config Reload](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-resilience/how-to-hot-reload/)
- [index](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-resilience/reference/)
- [API](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-resilience/reference/api/)
- [AI Coding Skills](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-resilience/skills/)
- [FAQ](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-resilience/faq/)
- [Troubleshooting](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-resilience/troubleshooting/)
- [Changelog](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-resilience/CHANGELOG/)

## For agents

- [Full docs in one file](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-resilience/llms-full.txt)
- [AGENTS.md (conventions and boundaries)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dperezcabrera/pico-resilience/main/AGENTS.md)
- [Flagship use case (whole ecosystem wired)](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-boot/flagship/)
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/pico-resilience/)
